blended.narrative: Bristol Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,544 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
